case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. PATRICIA FRANTOM ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC AS TO DEFENDANT FRANTOM, PATRICIA AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF H OLSEN ISO DEFAULT (TRANSACTION ID # 68995958) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 69008181)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC AS TO DEFENDANT FRANTOM, PATRICIA AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANTOM, PATRICIA AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 909 GEARY STREET #421 CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94109, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 68995958)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FRANTOM, PATRICIA AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 68920062), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC SERVED JAN-13-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRANTOM, PATRICIA AN INDIVIDUAL

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FRANTOM, PATRICIA AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 68920062), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC SERVED JAN-13-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JAN-14-2023 AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 68995958) AS TO DEFENDANT FRANTOM, PATRICIA AN INDIVIDUAL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 68995958) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE ** IS $16.76 PER DAY ** (TRANSACTION ID # 68995958) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC
